stemHtml: Which data can be extracted from the Buffet Onset Boundary Chart?

options.a: The values of the Mach number at which low speed and Mach buffet occur at various masses and altitudes.
options.b: The value of the critical Mach number at various masses and altitudes.
options.c: The value of maximum operating Mach number (MMO) at various masses and power settings.
options.d: The value of the Mach number at which low speed and shockstall occur at various masses and altitudes.
